# rogersac GitHub Projects

> GitHub Pages landing page for rogersac's public repositories, software experiments, and active work.

This site is a lightweight directory to the owner's public GitHub profile and repositories. The homepage loads current profile and repository data from the public GitHub REST API.

## Docs

- [Homepage](https://rogersac.github.io/): Human-facing landing page with live repository data.
- [Full LLM summary](https://rogersac.github.io/llms-full.txt): Plain-text summary of the site, ownership, and canonical links.
- [GitHub profile](https://github.com/rogersac): Public GitHub profile.
- [Public repositories](https://github.com/rogersac?tab=repositories): Current public repository listing.

## Optional

- [Repository README](https://github.com/rogersac/rogersac.github.io/blob/main/README.md): Maintenance and deployment notes.
- [Sitemap](https://rogersac.github.io/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap for search crawlers.
- [Robots](https://rogersac.github.io/robots.txt): Crawl directives.
